productDisplayName: Puma Men Heroes Graphic Yellow Tshirts
description: Composition Yellow round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has black fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, black thread detailing along the back of the neck and shoulder and graphic print on the front with brand name and logo Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Looking hep comes easy with this yellow Heroes Graphics t-shirt from puma. A smart graphic pattern of fabulous puma shoes on the front makes this tee absolutely irresistible. Team it with jeans or shorts for that perfect look.
